title: Anesthesia Program Educational Objectives
content:
Anesthesia Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. The duty of anesthesia technicians is to assist the authorized anesthesiologist in anesthesia applications in the health sector, to take part in patient preparation and to be in the closest proximity to the patient, namely in the operating room, during the application.

2. Anesthesia program graduates are tried to be trained in a way that they know the patient, the disease, the drugs to be used and the conditions they are in very closely. Our graduates who are in the anesthesia team are auxiliary health personnel. Our training program aims to equip students with the necessary knowledge and skills in this direction.

3. To train technicians who can prepare patients before surgery, support the anesthesiologist during surgery, and undertake patient control and supervision after surgery. In addition to advanced anesthesia machines and various anesthesia techniques, students are informed about sterilization and emergency patient care.
